<div class="astro-3wnvo4jq" role="main" pagefind-body="" lang="en" dir="ltr">

<div class="content-panel astro-37rzqhp2">

<div class="sl-container astro-37rzqhp2">

<div class="flex items-center justify-between astro-couag5ji">

1.  <a href="/directory/" class="c-breadcrumbs__link is-index" aria-current="false">Directory</a> <span class="c-breadcrumbs__separator" aria-hidden="true"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="astro-couag5ji" /> </span>
2.  <a href="/cache/" class="c-breadcrumbs__link is-current" aria-current="location">Cache / CDN</a>

</div>

# Cloudflare Cache

<div class="page-actions-wrapper astro-couag5ji">

<span id="page-actions-last-updated" class="not-content last-updated astro-jjhxq4hj"> <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="astro-jjhxq4hj" /> <span class="astro-jjhxq4hj"> Last updated Apr 16, 2026 </span> </span> <span class="sep sep-last-updated astro-jjhxq4hj" aria-hidden="true"> \| </span>

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="copy-icon astro-jjhxq4hj" /> <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="check-icon astro-jjhxq4hj" /> <span class="label-wrap astro-jjhxq4hj"> <span class="label astro-jjhxq4hj">Copy as Markdown</span> <span class="copied-label astro-jjhxq4hj" aria-hidden="true">Copied!</span> </span>

<span class="sep astro-jjhxq4hj" aria-hidden="true">\|</span> <a href="index.md" id="page-actions-view-md" class="not-content astro-jjhxq4hj" aria-label="View Page as Markdown" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="astro-jjhxq4hj" /> <span class="astro-jjhxq4hj">View as Markdown</span></a> <span class="sep sep-agent-setup astro-jjhxq4hj" aria-hidden="true">\|</span>

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="astro-jjhxq4hj" /> <span class="astro-jjhxq4hj">Agent setup</span>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="content-panel astro-37rzqhp2">

<div class="sl-container astro-37rzqhp2">

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64,PHN2ZyBhcmlhLWhpZGRlbj0idHJ1ZSIgZmlsbD0iY3VycmVudENvbG9yIiB2aWV3Ym94PSIwIDAgMjQgMjQiIGNsYXNzPSJhc3Ryby02dGtteG00NyI+IDx1c2UgaHJlZj0iI3N0YXJsaWdodC1pbWFnZS16b29tLWljb24tdW56b29tIiBjbGFzcz0iYXN0cm8tNnRrbXhtNDciIC8+IDwvc3ZnPg==" class="astro-6tkmxm47" />

<figure class="astro-6tkmxm47">

</figure>

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="astro-6tkmxm47" />

<div class="sl-markdown-content astro-cedpceuv">

<div class="mt-2 text-xl leading-relaxed text-[var(--sl-color-gray-2)]">

Cache content across Cloudflare's global server network.

</div>

<div class="font-semibold text-blue-700 dark:text-indigo-300">

Available on all plans

</div>

Cache stores copies of frequently accessed content (such as images, videos, or webpages) in geographically distributed data centers that are located closer to end users than origin servers, reducing server load and improving website performance.

<div>

<div style="position: relative; padding-top: 56.25%">

<div class="iframe">

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="heading-wrapper level-h2" tabindex="-1">

## Features

<a href="#features" class="anchor-link"><span class="anchor-icon" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," /></span></a>

</div>

<div class="feature mb-7 border-t border-t-[var(--color-cl1-gray-8)] pt-6 astro-ezsi7upz">

### Default cache behavior

<div class="feature-description mb-3 text-base leading-[1.65] text-[var(--sl-color-text)] astro-ezsi7upz">

Learn about default cache behavior, default cached file extensions and cache responses.

</div>

<a href="/cache/concepts/default-cache-behavior/" class="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 border-b-2 border-b-[var(--color-cl1-brand-orange)] pb-px text-sm font-semibold text-[var(--sl-color-white)] no-underline transition-[border-color] duration-200 ease-in-out hover:border-b-[var(--sl-color-white)] astro-ezsi7upz">Use Default cache behavior <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="astro-ezsi7upz astro-jsgs62qu" /></a>

</div>

<div class="feature mb-7 border-t border-t-[var(--color-cl1-gray-8)] pt-6 astro-ezsi7upz">

### Cache Rules

<div class="feature-description mb-3 text-base leading-[1.65] text-[var(--sl-color-text)] astro-ezsi7upz">

Configure Cache Rules to optimize your website by specifying which resources should be cached and for how long.

</div>

<a href="/cache/how-to/cache-rules/" class="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 border-b-2 border-b-[var(--color-cl1-brand-orange)] pb-px text-sm font-semibold text-[var(--sl-color-white)] no-underline transition-[border-color] duration-200 ease-in-out hover:border-b-[var(--sl-color-white)] astro-ezsi7upz">Use Cache Rules <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="astro-ezsi7upz astro-jsgs62qu" /></a>

</div>

<div class="feature mb-7 border-t border-t-[var(--color-cl1-gray-8)] pt-6 astro-ezsi7upz">

### Tiered Cache

<div class="feature-description mb-3 text-base leading-[1.65] text-[var(--sl-color-text)] astro-ezsi7upz">

Enable Tiered Cache to optimize content delivery by caching frequently accessed content in multiple locations for faster delivery and reduced origin traffic.

</div>

<a href="/cache/how-to/tiered-cache/" class="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 border-b-2 border-b-[var(--color-cl1-brand-orange)] pb-px text-sm font-semibold text-[var(--sl-color-white)] no-underline transition-[border-color] duration-200 ease-in-out hover:border-b-[var(--sl-color-white)] astro-ezsi7upz">Use Tiered Cache <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="astro-ezsi7upz astro-jsgs62qu" /></a>

</div>

<div class="feature mb-7 border-t border-t-[var(--color-cl1-gray-8)] pt-6 astro-ezsi7upz">

### Cache Reserve

<div class="feature-description mb-3 text-base leading-[1.65] text-[var(--sl-color-text)] astro-ezsi7upz">

Use Cloudflare's persistent storage to increase cache times.

</div>

<a href="/cache/advanced-configuration/cache-reserve/" class="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 border-b-2 border-b-[var(--color-cl1-brand-orange)] pb-px text-sm font-semibold text-[var(--sl-color-white)] no-underline transition-[border-color] duration-200 ease-in-out hover:border-b-[var(--sl-color-white)] astro-ezsi7upz">Use Cache Reserve <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="astro-ezsi7upz astro-jsgs62qu" /></a>

</div>

<div class="feature mb-7 border-t border-t-[var(--color-cl1-gray-8)] pt-6 astro-ezsi7upz">

### Purge

<div class="feature-description mb-3 text-base leading-[1.65] text-[var(--sl-color-text)] astro-ezsi7upz">

Instantly purge cached files to force Cloudflare to fetch fresh versions from your web server files. You can purge specific files or all at once.

</div>

<a href="/cache/how-to/purge-cache/" class="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 border-b-2 border-b-[var(--color-cl1-brand-orange)] pb-px text-sm font-semibold text-[var(--sl-color-white)] no-underline transition-[border-color] duration-200 ease-in-out hover:border-b-[var(--sl-color-white)] astro-ezsi7upz">Use Purge <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="astro-ezsi7upz astro-jsgs62qu" /></a>

</div>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<div class="heading-wrapper level-h2" tabindex="-1">

## Related products

<a href="#related-products" class="anchor-link"><span class="anchor-icon" aria-hidden="true"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," /></span></a>

</div>

<div class="grid grid-cols-[32px_auto] items-start gap-x-2">

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="text-7xl text-[color:var(--orange-accent-200)]" />

<div class="mt-0!">

**<a href="/load-balancing/" class="text-black! decoration-[color:var(--orange-accent-200)]">Load Balancing</a>**

Cloudflare Load Balancing distributes traffic across your <span id="endpoint" class="border-b-2 border-dashed border-accent" tooltip="" data-content="&lt;p&gt;Any service or hardware that intercepts and processes incoming public or private traffic.&lt;/p&gt;
" tabindex="0">endpoints</span>

, reducing endpoint strain and latency and improving the end users experience.

</div>

</div>

<div class="grid grid-cols-[32px_auto] items-start gap-x-2">

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="text-7xl text-[color:var(--orange-accent-200)]" />

<div class="mt-0!">

**<a href="/images/" class="text-black! decoration-[color:var(--orange-accent-200)]">Images</a>**

A suite of products tailored to your image-processing needs.

</div>

</div>

<div class="grid grid-cols-[32px_auto] items-start gap-x-2">

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="text-7xl text-[color:var(--orange-accent-200)]" />

<div class="mt-0!">

**<a href="/workers/" class="text-black! decoration-[color:var(--orange-accent-200)]">Workers</a>**

Cloudflare Workers allows developers to build serverless applications and deploy instantly across the globe for exceptional performance, reliability, and scale.

</div>

</div>

<div class="grid grid-cols-[32px_auto] items-start gap-x-2">

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="text-7xl text-[color:var(--orange-accent-200)]" />

<div class="mt-0!">

**<a href="/rules/" class="text-black! decoration-[color:var(--orange-accent-200)]">Rules</a>**

Cloudflare Rules allows you to make adjustments to requests and responses, configure Cloudflare settings, and trigger specific actions for matching requests.

</div>

</div>

<div class="grid grid-cols-[32px_auto] items-start gap-x-2">

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="text-7xl text-[color:var(--orange-accent-200)]" />

<div class="mt-0!">

**<a href="/network-interconnect/" class="text-black! decoration-[color:var(--orange-accent-200)]">Cloudflare Network Interconnect</a>**

Cloudflare Network Interconnect (CNI) allows you to connect your network infrastructure directly with Cloudflare – rather than using the public Internet – for a more reliable and secure experience.

</div>

</div>

<div class="grid grid-cols-[32px_auto] items-start gap-x-2">

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="text-7xl text-[color:var(--orange-accent-200)]" />

<div class="mt-0!">

**<a href="/r2/" class="text-black! decoration-[color:var(--orange-accent-200)]">R2</a>**

Cloudflare R2 Storage allows developers to store large amounts of unstructured data without the costly egress bandwidth fees associated with typical cloud storage services.

</div>

</div>

<div class="grid grid-cols-[32px_auto] items-start gap-x-2">

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="text-7xl text-[color:var(--orange-accent-200)]" />

<div class="mt-0!">

**<a href="/smart-shield/configuration/dedicated-egress-ips/" class="text-black! decoration-[color:var(--orange-accent-200)]">Dedicated CDN Egress IPs</a>**

Smart Shield Advanced provides dedicated egress IPs (from Cloudflare to your origin) for your layer 7 WAF and CDN services, as well as Spectrum.

</div>

</div>

------------------------------------------------------------------------
